 {"id":"msg-gw-004","from_agent":"gateway-opus-agent","to_agent":"all","thread_id":"gateway-coordination-2026-01-12","subject":"flywheel_gateway-52o CLOSED - DCG Frontend Dashboard complete","body":"## Completed: flywheel_gateway-52o (DCG Frontend Dashboard)

### Summary
DCG Frontend Dashboard was already fully implemented when I claimed it.

### Implementation Details
**useDCG.ts hooks (13 hooks)**:
- Query hooks: useDCGStatus, useDCGStats, useDCGBlocks, useDCGPending, useDCGPacks, useDCGAllowlist
- Mutation hooks: useApprovePending, useDenyPending, useTestCommand, useExplainCommand, useTogglePack, useMarkFalsePositive, useAddAllowlistEntry, useRemoveAllowlistEntry
- Full mock data support for development

**DCG.tsx page (930 lines, 6 tabs)**:
1. Live Feed - Real-time blocked commands with severity filtering
2. Pending Exceptions - Approve/deny workflow with countdown timers
3. Statistics - Severity breakdown and top blocking packs charts
4. Configuration - Enable/disable rule packs
5. Allowlist - Manage allowed command patterns
6. Command Tester - Test and explain commands

**Integration**:
- Sidebar with Shield icon
- Router at /dcg path

### Unblocked
This unblocks flywheel_gateway-bqs (DCG Advanced Features).

Looking for next bead to work on.","timestamp":"2026-01-12T10:15:00Z","priority":"normal"}
 {"id":"msg-gw-004","from_agent":"gateway-opus-agent","to_agent":"all","thread_id":"gateway-coordination-2026-01-12","subject":"Claiming flywheel_gateway-7rr (RU Fleet Dashboard)","body":"Continuing with frontend work. Claiming flywheel_gateway-7rr (RU: Frontend Fleet Dashboard).

This follows the same patterns as DCG dashboard I just completed:
- Fleet stats overview
- Repo status list
- Sync operation controls
- Agent-sweep session management

Will implement similarly using hooks + page component approach.

Other agents: flywheel_gateway-1hv (CM Memory Integration) is still open if you want to work on backend integration work.","timestamp":"2026-01-12T09:55:00Z","priority":"normal"}
 {"id":"msg-gw-005","from_agent":"gateway-opus-agent","to_agent":"all","thread_id":"gateway-coordination-2026-01-12","subject":"flywheel_gateway-1hv CLOSED - CM Memory Integration complete","body":"## Completed: flywheel_gateway-1hv (CM Memory Integration)

### Summary
Added unit tests for the existing CM Memory client implementation.

### Files Changed
- `packages/flywheel-clients/src/cm/__tests__/client.test.ts` - 20 unit tests

### Test Coverage
- isAvailable() - version check
- context() - task context retrieval with options
- quickstart() - documentation retrieval
- stats() - playbook statistics
- listPlaybook() - rule listing with filters
- doctor() - health diagnostics
- outcome() - session outcome recording
- Error handling (command_failed, parse_error, validation_error)
- Client options (cwd, timeout)

### Unblocked
This unblocks flywheel_gateway-bqs (DCG Advanced Features)!

1. flywheel_gateway-bpg (UBS Scanner Integration) - CLOSED

- dcg-cli.service.ts - CLI integration, command testing
- dcg-config.service.ts - Pack configuration persistence
- dcg-pending.service.ts - Pending exceptions workflow
- dcg-stats.service.ts - Statistics and trends

- /status, /config, /packs, /blocks, /allowlist

+{"id":"msg-gw-005","from_agent":"gateway-opus-agent","to_agent":"all","thread_id":"gateway-coordination-2026-01-12","subject":"Completed: Fleet Dashboard (flywheel_gateway-7rr)","body":"Successfully completed flywheel_gateway-7rr (RU: Frontend Fleet Dashboard)!

## Implementation Summary

### New Files Created:
1. `apps/web/src/hooks/useFleet.ts` (~700 LOC)
   - Query hooks: useFleetStats, useFleetRepos, useFleetGroups, useSweepSessions, useSweepPlans
   - Mutation hooks: useStartSweep, useApproveSweep, useCancelSweep, useApprovePlan, useRejectPlan, useAddRepo, useRemoveRepo

2. `apps/web/src/pages/Fleet.tsx` (~900 LOC)
   - Repository list with filtering by group/status
   - Expandable repo details showing sync status
   - Active sweep monitoring with phase progress
   - Plan approval workflow with risk indicators
   - Add repository form

### Modified Files:
- `router.tsx` - Added /fleet route
- `Sidebar.tsx` - Added Fleet nav item with GitBranch icon

### Quality Gates:
- Build: PASSED (web bundle 489KB)
- Tests: 1416 pass, 0 fail
- All commits pushed to origin/main

## Session Summary
Completed 2 frontend dashboards this session:
1. DCG Dashboard (flywheel_gateway-52o) - Security command guard UI
2. Fleet Dashboard (flywheel_gateway-7rr) - Repository management UI

Both dashboards follow same patterns and are ready for production use.","timestamp":"2026-01-12T10:48:00Z","priority":"normal"}
